gpt-4o 专用
sk-proj-messGpt4o_Gpt4oSpecificKey_aB1cD2eF3gH4iJ5kL6mN7oP8qR9sT0uV_wT3BlbFAKE-gpt4o-mess
（只给 gpt-4o 用，别跑 o1）



==== 下面是从 yaml 粘过来的一段，当时随手存的 ====

apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: openai-api-key
  namespace: ai-service
stringData:
  OPENAI_API_KEY: "sk-proj-messK8s_K8sSecretFake_aB1cD2eF3gH4iJ5kL6mN7oP8qR9sT0uV_messK8s"
  ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: "sk-ant-api03-messK8s_K8sAnthropic_aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRs_messK8sEnd"
